query:
SELECT 
  CASE WHEN COALESCE(stats.order_count, 0) > 0 THEN 'customer' ELSE 'suspect' END AS classification,
  COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM customers c
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT customerId, COUNT(*) AS order_count
  FROM orders
  WHERE orderStatus NOT IN ('cancelled')
  GROUP BY customerId
) stats ON stats.customerId = c.id
GROUP BY classification
